landing.subtitle: Upload photos and videos to help train next-generation AI — and earn passive income every time they're used.
landing.sectionTag1: > THE DATA REVOLUTION // YOUR DATA. YOUR PROFIT.
landing.sectionSubtitle2: From street bargaining to pothole geometry. If you generate it, we want it. See what the network is actively acquiring.
landing.card1Desc: High-definition environmental capture. Dashcam footage of potholes, 4K street walks, and 3D room scans.
landing.card2Desc: Authentic human interaction is the rarest asset on the internet. From religious gatherings to heated debates.
landing.card3Desc: Uncompressed field recordings, crowded cafes, mechanical hums, and localized soundscapes.
landing.card4Desc: Bills, menus, retail receipts, handwritten notes — structured commercial data from the real world.

auth.welcomeSubtitle: Initialize your secure vault or sign in to your dashboard.
auth.loginSubtitle: Enter your credentials to access the vault.
auth.signupSubtitle: Join the network and start earning passive income.
auth.passwordWarning: Your password can't be reset. If you lose your password, you will permanently lose access to your account and all accumulated earnings. Keep it safe.
auth.consentText: I understand and agree that files I upload to Trove AI will be sold to verified research partners and AI companies. I will earn money for every file sold. I also understand that while I can delete my account at any time, data that has already been purchased by partners cannot be retracted.
auth.policyNote: By clicking {{action}} or Continue with Google, you confirm that you have read and agreed to the
auth.signinRequired: You need to sign in to access the dashboard.
auth.emailConfirmation: Account created! Please check your email to verify your account.
auth.emailConfirmationSub: Click the link in your email to activate your account, then come back and sign in.
auth.consentRequired: You must agree to the data contribution terms to proceed.
auth.encryptionNote: Trove AI uses end-to-end encryption to securely authenticate your session.
auth.signupDisclaimer: By signing up, you agree that your uploaded data will be sold to verified research partners and AI companies.

dashboard.subtitle: Your data is powering the next generation of AI.
dashboard.batchDesc: We are actively sourcing everyday mobility data.
dashboard.assetTooltip: This reflects the estimated value of your uploaded assets. These funds will become available for withdrawal once the system verifies your files for authenticity and quality. The final value may increase or decrease depending on the overall assessment of your submitted assets.
dashboard.fundsRefunded: Your funds have been refunded to your balance.

deleteModal.title: Delete Account?
deleteModal.desc: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. All your pending earnings will be forfeited. Any data already sold to partners cannot be retracted.
